zh.of Burton,Maelor Gymraeg,Denbighshire,Wa: 英國威爾斯丹比爾伯頓
zh.lifeSummary: Annes verch Iorwerth of Burton是Iorwerth和Mrs Iorwerth的女兒，於1262年出生在威爾士丹比爾伯頓。她於1284年與Dafydd ap Gronwy of Burton在威爾士丹比爾伯頓結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世在英國威爾斯丹比爾，埋葬在英國威爾斯丹比爾。

zh-hans.of Burton,Maelor Gymraeg,Denbighshire,Wa: 英国威尔斯丹比爾伯頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Annes verch Iorwerth of Burton是Iorwerth和Mrs Iorwerth的女儿，于1262年出生在威尔士丹比爾伯頓。她于1284年与Dafydd ap Gronwy of Burton在威尔士丹比爾伯頓结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世在英国威尔斯丹比爾，埋葬在英国威尔斯丹比爾。

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Annes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and English: a medieval vernacular form of   Agnes  , which gave rise to a surname. Its modern use as a given name is probably at least in part a transferred use of the surname as well as a revival of the medieval given name.

variants.name: Annice
meanings: Variant spelling of Annis , based on the numerous women's names ending in -ice.

variants.name: Annys
meanings: and English: a medieval vernacular form of   Agnes  , which gave rise to a surname. Its modern use as a given name is probably at least in part a transferred use of the surname as well as a revival of the medieval given name.

en.lifeSummary: Annes verch Iorwerth of Burton was born in 1262, in Burton, Denbighshire, Wales as the daughter of Iorwerth and Mrs Iorwerth. She married Dafydd ap Gronwy of Burton in 1284, in Burton, Denbighshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. She died in Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom, and was buried in Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.of Burton,Maelor Gymraeg,Denbighshire,Wa: Burton, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Annes verch Iorwerth of Burton est née en 1262, à Burton, Denbighshire, Galles, fille de Iorwerth et Mrs Iorwerth. Elle a épousé Dafydd ap Gronwy of Burton en 1284, à Burton, Denbighshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée à Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Annes verch Iorwerth of Burton wurde 1262 in Burton, Denbighshire, Wales, als Tochter von Iorwerth und Mrs Iorwerth geboren. Sie hat 1284 in Burton, Denbighshire, Wales Dafydd ap Gronwy of Burton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb in Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

Morì nel Denbighshire, Galles, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Denbighshire, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Annes verch Iorwerth of Burtonは1262年にウェールズデンビグhシュアイアブルトンでIorwerthとMrs Iorwerthの娘として生まれた。1284年にウェールズデンビグhシュアイアブルトンでDafydd ap Gronwy of Burtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアで死去し，イギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Annes verch Iorwerth of Burton(은)는 1262년 웨일스 덴비그h실르 버턴에서 Iorwerth(와)과 Mrs Iorwerth의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1284년 웨일스 덴비그h실르 버턴에서 Dafydd ap Gronwy of Burton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르에서 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Annes verch Iorwerth of Burton nasceu em 1262, em Burton, Denbighshire, Gales filha de Iorwerth e Mrs Iorwerth. Ela casou-se com Dafydd ap Gronwy of Burton em 1284, em Burton, Denbighshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em Denbighshire, Gales, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Denbighshire, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Annes verch Iorwerth of Burton родилась в 1262 г. в местности буртон, денбаишир, Уэльс. Её родителей звали Iorwerth и Mrs Iorwerth. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Dafydd ap Gronwy of Burton в 1284 г. в местности буртон, денбаишир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в местности денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Annes verch Iorwerth of Burton nació en 1262, en Burton, Denbighshire, Gales como hija de Iorwerth y Mrs Iorwerth. Se casó con Dafydd ap Gronwy of Burton en 1284, en Burton, Denbighshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en Denbighshire, Gales, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Denbighshire, Gales, Reino Unido.
